item.title: 特朗普抛弃经济外交，转向战争的强权政治
item.description: 通过关税等手段施加经济压力已显现其局限性【原文：Economic arm-twisting with tools like tariffs showed its limitations】

item.title: 卡塔尔因遭袭击暂停全球最大液化天然气工厂生产
item.description: 卡塔尔能源公司在一份声明中表示，在拉斯拉凡天然气液化厂遭到军事袭击后，该公司已停止液化天然气生产。【原文：QatarEnergy ceased liquefied natural gas production after military attacks on its Ras Laffan complex, the company said in a statement.】

item.title: 欧洲央行委员温施称不会对油价飙升“仓促”反应
item.description: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员皮埃尔·温施表示，目前他倾向于忽略中东冲突引发的能源价格上涨。【原文：European Central Bank Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch said he’s inclined for now to look past the jump in energy prices caused by the fighting in the Middle East.】

item.title: 英伟达黄仁勋表示软件抛售忽略了人工智能的长期效益
item.description: 最大供应商或将采用人工智能技术助力客户业务提升【原文：Biggest providers likely to adapt AI to improve customers’ businesses】

item.title: SAP重组董事会，首席执行官克莱因将专注于人工智能开发
item.description: SAP SE首席执行官克里斯蒂安·克莱因宣布了一项重组执行委员会的计划，并表示将亲自加大对人工智能的关注力度。这家欧洲最有价值的软件公司正面临来自该技术的日益增大的压力。【原文：SAP SE Chief Executive Officer Christian Klein announced a plan to shake up its executive board and said he will personally boost his focus on artificial intelligence as Europe’s most valuable software company faces increasing pressure from the technology.】

item.title: 智利经济在关键利率决议前录得温和月度增长
item.description: 智利央行报告称，随着矿业复苏，该国经济活动在1月份实现连续第二个月增长。投资者正权衡政策制定者是否会在3月下旬降息。【原文：Chile’s economic activity grew for the second straight month in January as mining bounced back, the central bank reported as investors mull whether policymakers will cut their interest rate later in March.】

item.title: 力拓批准斥资4.73亿美元扩建南非矿山
item.description: 力拓集团批准其理查兹湾矿业公司斥资4.73亿美元扩建矿山，结束了该南非项目长达数月的停工状态。【原文：Rio Tinto Group approved a $473 million mine expansion at its Richards Bay Minerals unit, ending a prolonged suspension of the South African project.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊表示，伊朗不太可能削弱看涨观点
item.description: 摩根士丹利策略师认为，伊朗和中东地区冲突的爆发不太可能动摇他们对美国股市的乐观预期，除非油价出现急剧且持续的上涨。【原文：Morgan Stanley strategists see the eruption of conflict in Iran and the Middle East as unlikely to derail their bullish view on US stocks, barring a sharp and sustained surge in oil prices.】

item.title: 美国对伊朗发动袭击推高油价，股市应声下跌
item.description:
霍尔木兹海峡几乎全面关闭航运通道，金价上涨，油价飙升。

【原文：

Gold rallies, oil prices surge as Strait of Hormuz all but closed to shipping.

】

item.title: 摩根大通在杠杆收购中测试"可能性的艺术"
item.description: 去年摩根大通牵头为艺电公司550亿美元的收购案提供融资，创下杠杆收购纪录。华尔街视此为信号，预示着为巨额私募股权交易提供资金的丰厚时期可能强势回归。【原文：When JPMorgan Chase & Co. took the lead last year in financing the $55 billion takeover of Electronic Arts Inc., a record-setting leveraged buyout, Wall Street saw it as a sign that a lucrative period of bankrolling super-sized private equity deals might come roaring back.】

item.title: "美国优先"概念股光环褪色，人工智能与政策困境持续发酵
item.description: 美国股市正经历着某种程度的报应，这曾令世界羡慕许久。【原文：The US stock market is having what, for the longtime envy of the world, amounts to something of a comeuppance.】

item.title: 交易员削减对美联储、英国央行降息的押注，因战争加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 周一，由于中东战争推高油价并加剧通胀担忧，货币市场削减了对美国、英国和欧元区降息的押注。【原文：Money markets scaled back wagers on interest-rate cuts in the US, UK and euro area on Monday as war in the Middle East sent oil prices higher and fanned inflation fears.】

item.title: 移动巨头在2026年世界移动通信大会上应对人工智能热潮与地缘政治挑战
item.description: 在本周举行的移动通信行业年度盛会上，电信公司正努力证明：通过建立新的合作伙伴关系并推动人工智能驱动的创新，能够克服因需求激增和地缘政治因素而面临的供应链压力。【原文：At the mobile industry’s biggest annual gathering this week, telecom companies are trying to show that new partnerships and artificial intelligence-driven innovation can overcome supply chains strained by surging demand and geopolitics.】

item.title: 中国AI先驱MiniMax在火热市场中销售额翻倍有余
item.description: MiniMax集团2025年营收激增159%，远超预期，这一强劲增长势头正吸引投资者涌向中国领先的OpenAI竞争对手。【原文：MiniMax Group Inc. reported a better-than-expected 159% surge in revenue in 2025, reflecting the torrid growth that’s drawn investors to China’s leading OpenAI rivals.】

item.title: 意大利赤字终在2025年突破欧盟3%上限
item.description: 意大利去年未能达到欧盟3%的赤字上限，这对总理乔尔吉娅·梅洛尼的政府而言是个意外挫折。【原文：Italy didn’t manage to meet the European Union’s 3% deficit ceiling last year, an unexpected setback for Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s government.】

item.title: 巴伦乔伊11亿美元出售案凸显对并购精品公司的渴求
item.description: 随着全球并购活动升温，金融咨询公司纷纷加入战局，并引发了业内整合浪潮。【原文：As global dealmaking picks up, financial advisory firms are getting in on the action and sparking consolidation among themselves.】

item.title: 阿布扎比国家石油公司推迟债券发售，因信贷市场动荡
item.description: 据知情人士透露，阿联酋最大石油生产商阿布扎比国家石油公司正推迟其计划中的点心债券首次发行，因中东危机加剧了全球市场的波动。【原文：Abu Dhabi National Oil Co., the United Arab Emirates’ biggest oil producer, is delaying its planned debut dim sum bond offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Middle East crisis stokes volatility across markets.】

item.title: 摩根大通建议买入欧洲石油巨头，因海湾地区供应风险上升
item.description: 摩根大通分析师建议投资者买入欧洲石油天然气类股，例如壳牌公司或道达尔能源公司，理由是美国对伊朗的军事打击可能推高能源价格。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. analysts are telling investors to buy European oil and gas stocks like Shell Plc or TotalEnergies SE, arguing that US military strikes on Iran could keep energy prices elevated.】

item.title: 巴基斯坦死亡人数攀升至24人，亲伊朗抗议活动矛头直指美国
item.description: 周日，巴基斯坦境内多家美国领事馆外爆发抗议活动，造成至少24人死亡。为平息民众对伊朗最高领袖遇刺事件的愤怒情绪，当局已在部分地区实施宵禁。【原文：At least 24 people were killed in protests outside several US consulates across Pakistan on Sunday, prompting authorities to impose a curfew in some regions to quell the anger against the killing of Iran’s top leader.】

item.title: 花旗分析师曼西认为英国股市是应对伊朗战争的良好对冲工具
item.description: 花旗集团策略师指出，英国股票可有效对冲伊朗战争爆发后地缘政治动荡加剧的风险。【原文：UK stocks offer an effective hedge against renewed geopolitical turmoil following the outbreak of war in Iran, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.】

item.title: 力拓暂停与日本铝业费率谈判，因伊朗遭袭事件
item.description: 力拓集团已暂停与日本客户就第二季度铝供应进行的谈判，理由是美国和以色列对伊朗的打击行动在关键产区引发了不断升级的敌对行动。【原文：Rio Tinto Group has suspended negotiations with Japanese clients over second-quarter aluminum supply, citing US and Israeli strikes against Iran that have triggered escalating hostilities in a key producing region.】

item.title: 中东至中国关键航线油轮运费暴涨
item.description: 由于中东战争和船舶供应日益紧张，租用油轮从中东向中国运输石油的临时费率自上周五以来已翻了一番多。【原文：Provisional rates to hire a tanker to carry oil from the Middle East to China have more than doubled since Friday due to the war in the Middle East and an increasingly tight supply of vessels.】

item.title: 欧洲债券交易暂停，中东战争动荡市场
item.description: 随着中东冲突冲击全球市场，信用风险指标攀升，欧洲借款人正暂停债券交易。【原文：Borrowers are putting bond deals on hold in Europe as conflict in the Middle East rocks global markets, sending credit-risk gauges higher.】

item.title: 全球信贷市场动荡加剧，人工智能引发抛售潮随着战事升级持续蔓延
item.description: 中东冲突正搅动本已因人工智能和私募市场风险而日趋脆弱的全球信贷市场，加剧了自去年解放日以来最糟糕的走势。【原文：The conflict in the Middle East is roiling global credit markets that were already growing vulnerable to risks posed by AI and private markets, deepening some of the worst moves since Liberation Day last year.】

item.title: 若中东冲突持续，印度经济将面临风险
item.description: 经济学家表示，如果中东冲突持续并扰乱该地区的石油供应，印度的经济增长将面临风险。该地区石油供应满足了全球第三大石油消费国印度的大部分需求。【原文：India’s growth is at risk from the crisis in the Middle East if the conflict endures and disrupts oil supplies from the region that meet a large share of demand in the world’s third-largest oil consumer, economists said.】

item.title: 南非工厂前景黯淡，商业活动趋缓
item.description: 南非制造业信心指数在2月份小幅恶化，因商业活动放缓且就业岗位减少。【原文：South African manufacturing sentiment soured slightly in February as business activity weakened and employment declined.】

item.title: 交易速度如何接近光速
item.description:
交易技术取得了令人难以置信的进步。

【原文：

The incredible advances in trading technology.

】

item.title: 零散交易：交易如何接近光速（播客）
item.description: 普通人只需在电脑上输入股票交易指令，点击刷新按钮，交易便已完成。 看似如此迅捷，专业交易员的操作速度却更为惊人——每秒可执行数千笔交易。多年来，对速度的追求愈发激烈，竞争对手们竞相将自身系统部署得离交易所计算机更近，以缩短传输距离，实现更快的交易执行。这种现象如何形成？又将如何改变交易的本质？【原文：The average person can enter a stock trade on their computer, hit refresh, and the trade is done. As fast as that seems, there are professional traders moving even faster, executing thousands of trades per second. Over the years, the need for speed got so intense that competing firms would aim to get their own systems closer and closer to the exchange’s computers, so as to minimize the length of the wires and get their trades in even faster. How did this happen? And how does this change the natu】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡交通中断，中东石油定价陷入混乱
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡的能源运输中断正扰乱着全球部分主要原油品种的定价机制。【原文：The halt to energy shipments through the Strait of Hormuz is disrupting how some of the world’s major oil grades are priced.】

item.title: 爱尔兰《爱尔兰时报》报道称，诺和诺德斥资5.07亿美元投资威格维药丸工厂
item.description: 据《爱尔兰时报》周一报道，诺和诺德公司将斥资4.32亿欧元（约合5.07亿美元）升级其爱尔兰工厂，用于生产畅销减肥药Wegovy，供应美国以外市场。【原文：Novo Nordisk A/S will spend €432 million ($507 million) upgrading an Irish factory to produce its hit Wegovy weight-loss pill for markets outside the US, the Irish Times reported Monday.】
